properties.title: Fuel stop — Wegmans?
properties.thought: The Navigator is very soft. Probably too soft for whats ahead. Ten kilometers from launch ... and he is already stopping for food.
properties.status: all systems nominal.
properties.photoCaption: One last stop before saying goodbye to Wegmans until the fall.

properties.title: Camp — East Harbor
properties.thought: Too much pavement. Too many cars. Need to find some gravel on the way north. Soon.
properties.status: above 32C all day. too hot. where is the Arctic?

properties.title: Buttercup Wild Camp-day 2 and 3
properties.thought: vibe is good. day 2 and i've already found -- with a bit of help from The Navigator -- sweet double track and an empty wild camp.
properties.status: system nominal. Navigator in a tizzy. something about ticks everywhere. i wonder about him.
properties.photoCaption: sweet Michigan double track on way into camp

properties.title: Grace makes her migration 2026 debut
properties.status: too nice of a day for rest.
properties.photoCaption: Grace excited to get some mud on her tires, then enjoy a relaxing float.

properties.title: Tranquility found
properties.thought: Evenings like this make it easy to love Canada
properties.status: refigrator on the fritz. will monitor.

properties.title: Steelhead sighting
properties.thought: Steelhead fishing means gravel roads or, even better, double track. So I am a fan.
properties.status: refigrator still on the fritz.
properties.photoCaption: An Agawa River steelhead, caught and released by The Navigator.

properties.title: Camp at Agawa Bay, day 5, 6, and 7
properties.thought: Setting up camp for the night.
properties.status: refigrator still on the fritz.

properties.title: Coaster sighting
properties.thought: And brook trout fishing also leads to large amounts of gravel consumption. So I am still a fan.
properties.status: refigrator still on the fritz.
properties.photoCaption: An Agawa River lake-run brook trout, aka coaster, caught and released by The Navigator.

properties.title: Another coaster sighting
properties.status: refigrator thinking about working again.
properties.photoCaption: An Agawa River lake-run brook trout, aka coaster, caught and released by The Navigator.

properties.title: wild camp on the Steel River
properties.status: refigrator is working. reason unknown.
properties.photoCaption: A perfect evening. Cool. Some sun. No bugs.

properties.title: another wild camp on the Steel River
properties.status: refigrator is not working. reason unknown.
properties.photoCaption: Sun is out. It's warm. No bugs. Yet.

properties.title: field repair stop
properties.status: Completed field repair of Dometic CFX3. Resumed travel.

properties.title: camp at Cypress River
properties.status: Camp established and systems check complete.
properties.photoCaption: Cypress River camp setup for day 10.

properties.title: cypress river fishing
properties.status: The Navigator fished near Cypress River while I recharged the camper battery.

properties.title: kakabeka falls camp
properties.status: Set camp near Kakabeka Falls.

properties.title: moose sighting
properties.status: Moose spotted along the route in northern forest country.

properties.title: sow with coys sighting
properties.status: Observed a sow with cubs from a safe distance and continued on route.
properties.photoCaption: Sow with cubs sighting on day 12.

properties.title: Wild camp at edge of Agassiz National Wildlife Refuge
properties.status: Wild camp established for the night just outside of the refuge.

properties.title: Trumpeter swan sighting in Agassiz National Wildlife Refuge
properties.status: Departed from the Agassiz area and continued west on day 13.

properties.title: Camp near Surrey, ND
properties.status: Camp set at the end of day 13 for the night.

properties.title: Camp at Dog Creek on BLM land
properties.status: Rainy. Windy. Cold. But camp set at the end of day 14 route.
